name: 默认主题
contentCss: #view h1 { font-size: 1.7em; } #view h2 { font-size: 1.45em; } #view h3 { font-size: 1.2em; } #view h1, #view h2, #view h3 { line-height: 1.35; margin: 1.15em 0 0.62em; font-weight: 700; } #view p { margin: 0.88em 0; } #view ul, #view ol { padding-left: 1.5em; margin: 0.85em 0; } #view li { margin: 0.25em 0; } #view blockquote { margin: 0.9em 0; padding: 0.25em 0 0.25em 0.9em; border-left: 4px solid #d0d7de; color: #57606a; background: #f6f8fa; } #view table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 1em 0; } #view th, #view td { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding: 8px 10px; text-align: left; } #view th { background: #f8fafc; font-weight: 600; } #view a { color: #0969da; text-decoration: none; } #view a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
